                          • windows_view equals '64_bit'

                          V-254257 - Windows Server 2022 accounts must require passwords.

                          Rule ID:xccdf_mil.disa.stig_rule_SV-254257r958482_rule
                          Test Type:Automated
                          Rule Result:Pass
                          Version:WN22-00-000200
                          Identities:CCI-000764 (NIST SP 800-53: IA-2; NIST SP 800-53A: IA-2.1; NIST SP 800-53 Rev 4: IA-2; NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5: IA-2)
                          Description: The lack of password protection enables anyone to gain access to the information system, which opens a backdoor opportunity for intruders to compromise the system as well as other resources. Accounts on a system must require passwords.
                          Fix Text:Configure all enabled accounts to require passwords.

                          The password required flag can be set by entering the following on a command line: "Net user [username] /passwordreq:yes", substituting [username] with the name of the user account.
                          Severity:medium
                          Weight:10.0
                          Reference:
                          Title:DPMS Target Microsoft Windows Server 2022
                          Publisher:DISA
                          Type:DPMS Target
                          Subject:Microsoft Windows Server 2022
                          Identifier:5485
                          Definitions:
                          Definition ID:oval:navy.navwar.niwcatlantic.scc.windows2022:def:381
                          Definition Result:true
                          Title:SRG-OS-000104-GPOS-00051, SV-254257r958482
                          Description:Windows Server 2022 accounts must require passwords.
                          Class:compliance
                          Tests:
                          • true (One or more child tests must be true. (OR))
                            • true (All child tests must be true. (AND))
                              • true (Windows Server - Accounts must require passwords.)
                              • true (The system is a Windows Standalone Server or a Windows Domain Member Server)
                            • false (All child tests must be true. (AND))
                              • true (Windows Domain Controller - Accounts must require passwords.)
                              • false (The system is a Windows Domain Controller)
                          Tests:
                          Test ID:oval:navy.navwar.niwcatlantic.scc.windows2022:tst:381 (cmdlet_test)
                          Result:true
                          Title:Windows Server - Accounts must require passwords.
                          Check Existence:No collected items may exist.
                          Check:Result is based on check existence only.
                          Object ID:oval:navy.navwar.niwcatlantic.scc.windows2022:obj:381 (cmdlet_object)
                          Object Comment:Enabled Local Accounts with PasswordExpires=False should not exist
                          Object Requirements:
                          • module_name must be equal to 'Microsoft.Powershell.Management'
                          • verb must be equal to 'Get'
                          • noun must be equal to 'CimInstance'
                          • for 'parameters' the following must be true:
                            • class must be equal to 'Win32_Useraccount'
                            • filter must be equal to 'PasswordRequired=False and LocalAccount=True and Disabled=false'
                          • for 'select' the following must be true:
                            • unique must be equal to 'Name,PasswordRequired,Disabled,LocalAccount'
                          Test ID:oval:navy.navwar.niwcatlantic.scc.windows2022:tst:402 (wmi57_test)
                          Result:true
                          Title:The system is a Windows Standalone Server or a Windows Domain Member Server
                          Check Existence:One or more collected items must exist.
                          Check:All collected items must match the given state(s).
                          State Operator:One or more item-state comparisons may be true.
                          Object ID:oval:navy.navwar.niwcatlantic.scc.windows2022:obj:402 (wmi57_object)
                          Object Comment: 
                          Object Requirements:
                          • namespace must be equal to 'root\cimv2'
                          • wql must be equal to 'SELECT DomainRole FROM win32_computersystem'
                          State ID:oval:navy.navwar.niwcatlantic.scc.windows2022:ste:401 (wmi57_state)
                          State Comment:Standalone Server
                          State Requirements:
                          • for all 'result' the following must be true:
                            • all domainrole must be equal to '2'
                          State ID:oval:navy.navwar.niwcatlantic.scc.windows2022:ste:402 (wmi57_state)
                          State Comment:Domain Member Server
                          State Requirements:
                          • for all 'result' the following must be true:
                            • all domainrole must be equal to '3'
                          Collected Item/State Result:
                          [ true ]
                          • namespace equals 'root\cimv2'
                          • wql equals 'SELECT DomainRole FROM win32_computersystem'
                          • collected 'result' result:
                            • domainrole = '3'
                          Test ID:oval:navy.navwar.niwcatlantic.scc.windows2022:tst:382 (cmdlet_test)
                          Result:true
                          Title:Windows Domain Controller - Accounts must require passwords.
                          Check Existence:Zero or more collected items may exist.
                          Check:All collected items must match the given state(s).
                          Object ID:oval:navy.navwar.niwcatlantic.scc.windows2022:obj:382 (cmdlet_object)
                          Object Comment:Enabled Local Accounts with PasswordNeverExpires=False should not exist
                          Object Requirements:
                          • module_name must be equal to 'Microsoft.Powershell.Management'
                          • verb must be equal to 'Get'
                          • noun must be equal to 'ADUser'
                          • for 'parameters' the following must be true:
                            • filter must be equal to '*'
                            • properties must be equal to 'PasswordNotRequired'
                          • for 'select' the following must be true:
                            • unique must be equal to 'Name,PasswordNotRequired,Enabled'
                          State ID:oval:navy.navwar.niwcatlantic.scc.windows2022:ste:382 (cmdlet_state)
                          State Comment:Accounts with passwordnotrequired = true and enabled = true shall not exist
                          State Requirements:
                          • for no 'value' the following must be true:
                            • all passwordnotrequired must be equal (case insensitive) to 'true'
                            • all enabled must be equal (case insensitive) to 'true'
                          Test ID:oval:navy.navwar.niwcatlantic.scc.windows2022:tst:403 (wmi57_test)
                          Result:false
                          Title:The system is a Windows Domain Controller
                          Check Existence:One or more collected items must exist.
                          Check:All collected items must match the given state(s).
                          State Operator:One or more item-state comparisons may be true.
                          Object ID:oval:navy.navwar.niwcatlantic.scc.windows2022:obj:402 (wmi57_object)
                          Object Comment: 
                          Object Requirements:
                          • namespace must be equal to 'root\cimv2'
                          • wql must be equal to 'SELECT DomainRole FROM win32_computersystem'
                          State ID:oval:navy.navwar.niwcatlantic.scc.windows2022:ste:403 (wmi57_state)
                          State Comment:Backup Domain Controller
                          State Requirements:
                          • for all 'result' the following must be true:
                            • all domainrole must be equal to '4'
                          State ID:oval:navy.navwar.niwcatlantic.scc.windows2022:ste:404 (wmi57_state)
                          State Comment:Primary Domain Controller
                          State Requirements:
                          • for all 'result' the following must be true:
                            • all domainrole must be equal to '5'
                          Collected Item/State Result:
                          [ false ]
                          • namespace equals 'root\cimv2'
                          • wql equals 'SELECT DomainRole FROM win32_computersystem'
                          • collected 'result' result:
                            • domainrole = '3'

                          V-254258 - Windows Server 2022 passwords must be configured to expire.

                          Rule ID:xccdf_mil.disa.stig_rule_SV-254258r1038967_rule
                          Test Type:Automated
                          Rule Result:Fail
                          Version:WN22-00-000210
                          Identities:CCI-004066 (NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5: IA-5 (1) (h))
                          CCI-000199 (NIST SP 800-53: IA-5 (1) (d); NIST SP 800-53A: IA-5 (1).1 (v); NIST SP 800-53 Rev 4: IA-5 (1) (d))
                          CCI-000199 (NIST SP 800-53: IA-5 (1) (d); NIST SP 800-53A: IA-5 (1).1 (v); NIST SP 800-53 Rev 4: IA-5 (1) (d))
                          Description: Passwords that do not expire or are reused increase the exposure of a password with greater probability of being discovered or cracked.
                          Fix Text:Configure all enabled user account passwords to expire.

                          Uncheck "Password never expires" for all enabled user accounts in Active Directory Users and Computers for domain accounts and Users in Computer Management for member servers and standalone or nondomain-joined systems. Document any exceptions with the information system security officer (ISSO).
                          Severity:medium
                          Weight:10.0
                          Reference:
                          Title:DPMS Target Microsoft Windows Server 2022
                          Publisher:DISA
                          Type:DPMS Target
                          Subject:Microsoft Windows Server 2022
                          Identifier:5485
                          Definitions:
                          Definition ID:oval:navy.navwar.niwcatlantic.scc.windows2022:def:401
                          Definition Result:false
                          Title:SRG-OS-000076-GPOS-00044, SV-254258r1038967
                          Description:Windows Server 2022 passwords must be configured to expire.
                          Class:compliance
                          Tests:
                          • false (One or more child tests must be true. (OR))
                            • false (All child tests must be true. (AND))
                              • false (Windows Server - Passwords must be configured to expire.)
                              • true (The system is a Windows Standalone Server or a Windows Domain Member Server)
                            • false (All child tests must be true. (AND))
                              • true (Windows Domain Controller - Passwords must be configured to expire.)
                              • false (The system is a Windows Domain Controller)
                          Tests:
                          Test ID:oval:navy.navwar.niwcatlantic.scc.windows2022:tst:401 (cmdlet_test)
                          Result:false
                          Title:Windows Server - Passwords must be configured to expire.
                          Check Existence:No collected items may exist.
                          Check:Result is based on check existence only.
                          Object ID:oval:navy.navwar.niwcatlantic.scc.windows2022:obj:401 (cmdlet_object)
                          Object Comment:Enabled Local Accounts with PasswordExpires=False should not exist
                          Object Requirements:
                          • module_name must be equal to 'Microsoft.Powershell.Management'
                          • verb must be equal to 'Get'
                          • noun must be equal to 'CimInstance'
                          • for 'parameters' the following must be true:
                            • class must be equal to 'Win32_Useraccount'
                            • filter must be equal to 'PasswordExpires=False and LocalAccount=True and Disabled=False'
                          • for 'select' the following must be true:
                            • unique must be equal to 'Name,PasswordExpires,Disabled,LocalAccount'
                          Collected Item/State Result:
                          [ exists ]
                          • module_name equals 'Microsoft.PowerShell.Management'
                          • module_id equals '{eefcb906-b326-4e99-9f54-8b4bb6ef3c6d}'
                          • module_version equals '3.1.0.0'
                          • verb equals 'Get'
                          • noun equals 'CimInstance'
                          • collected 'parameters' result:
                            • class = 'Win32_Useraccount'
                            • filter = 'PasswordExpires=False and LocalAccount=True and Disabled=False'
                          • collected 'select' result:
                            • unique = 'Name,PasswordExpires,Disabled,LocalAccount'
                          • collected 'value' result:
                            • name = 'Administrator'
                            • passwordexpires = 'False'
                            • disabled = 'False'
                            • localaccount = 'True'
                          Result Analysis:Existence requirement is 'none_exists' and 1 collected item exists, so result is false
                          Test ID:oval:navy.navwar.niwcatlantic.scc.windows2022:tst:402 (wmi57_test)
                          Result:true
                          Title:The system is a Windows Standalone Server or a Windows Domain Member Server
                          Check Existence:One or more collected items must exist.
                          Check:All collected items must match the given state(s).
                          State Operator:One or more item-state comparisons may be true.
                          Object ID:oval:navy.navwar.niwcatlantic.scc.windows2022:obj:402 (wmi57_object)
                          Object Comment:

                          • namespace must be equal to 'root\cimv2'
                          • wql must be equal to 'SELECT DomainRole FROM win32_computersystem'

                          State Requirements:
                          • for all 'result' the following must be true:
                            • all domainrole must be equal to '2'
                          State ID:oval:navy.navwar.niwcatlantic.scc.windows2022:ste:402 (wmi57_state)
                          State Comment:Domain Member Server
                          State Requirements:
                          • for all 'result' the following must be true:
                            • all domainrole must be equal to '3'
                          Collected Item/State Result:
                          [ true ]

                          • wql equals 'SELECT DomainRole FROM win32_computersystem'
                          • collected 'result' result:
                            • domainrole = '3'
                          Test ID:oval:navy.navwar.niwcatlantic.scc.windows2022:tst:404 (cmdlet_test)
                          Result:true

                          Check Existence:Zero or more collected items may exist.

                          Object Comment:Enabled Local Accounts with PasswordExpires=False should not exist
                          Object Requirements:
                          • module_name must be equal to 'Microsoft.Powershell.Management'
                          • verb must be equal to 'Search'
                          • noun must be equal to 'ADAccount'

                            • passwordneverexpires must be equal to '' passwordneverexpires field must be blank
                            • usersonly must be equal to '' usersonly field must be blank

                            • unique must be equal to 'Name,PasswordNeverExpires,Enabled'

                            • all enabled must be equal (case insensitive) to 'true'

                          • wql must be equal to 'SELECT DomainRole FROM win32_computersystem'

                          State Requirements:
                          • for all 'result' the following must be true:
                            • all domainrole must be equal to '4'

                          V-254269 - Windows Server 2022 must not have the Fax Server role installed.

                          Rule ID:xccdf_mil.disa.stig_rule_SV-254269r958478_rule
                          Test Type:Automated
                          Rule Result:Pass
                          Version:WN22-00-000320
                          Identities:CCI-000381 (NIST SP 800-53: CM-7; NIST SP 800-53A: CM-7.1 (ii); NIST SP 800-53 Rev 4: CM-7 a; NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5: CM-7 a)
                          Description: Unnecessary services increase the attack surface of a system. Some of these services may not support required levels of authentication or encryption or may provide unauthorized access to the system.
                          Fix Text:Uninstall the "Fax Server" role.

                          Start "Server Manager".

                          Select the server with the role.

                          Scroll down to "ROLES AND FEATURES" in the right pane.

                          Select "Remove Roles and Features" from the drop-down "TASKS" list.

                          Select the appropriate server on the "Server Selection" page and click "Next".

                          Deselect "Fax Server" on the "Roles" page.

                          Click "Next" and "Remove" as prompted.
                          Severity:medium
                          Weight:10.0
                          Reference:
                          Title:DPMS Target Microsoft Windows Server 2022
                          Publisher:DISA
                          Type:DPMS Target
                          Subject:Microsoft Windows Server 2022
                          Identifier:5485
                          Definitions:
                          Definition ID:oval:mil.disa.stig.windows2022:def:254269
                          Definition Result:true
                          Title:WN22-00-000320 - Windows Server 2022 must not have the Fax Server role installed.
                          Description:Unnecessary services increase the attack surface of a system. Some of these services may not support required levels of authentication or encryption or may provide unauthorized access to the system.
                          Class:compliance
                          Tests:
                          • true (All child tests must be true. (AND))
                            • true (All child tests must be true. (AND))
                              • true (The Fax server role is not installed.)
                          Tests:
                          Test ID:oval:mil.disa.stig.win:tst:25426900 (wmi57_test)
                          Result:true
                          Title:The Fax server role is not installed.
                          Check Existence:Zero or more collected items may exist.
                          Check:All collected items must match the given state(s).
                          Object ID:oval:mil.disa.stig.win:obj:25426900 (wmi57_object)
                          Object Comment:Fax Server
                          Object Requirements:
                          • namespace must be equal to 'root\cimv2'
                          • wql must be equal to 'SELECT startmode FROM Win32_Service WHERE name='fax''
                          State ID:oval:mil.disa.stig.win:ste:25426900 (wmi57_state)
                          State Comment:StartMode is Disabled
                          State Requirements:
                          • for all 'result' the following must be true:
                            • all startmode must be equal to 'Disabled'
                          Collected Item/State Result:
                          [ does not exist ]
                          • namespace equals 'root\cimv2'
                          • wql equals 'SELECT startmode FROM Win32_Service WHERE name='fax''

                          V-254270 - Windows Server 2022 must not have the Microsoft FTP service installed unless required by the organization.

                          Rule ID:xccdf_mil.disa.stig_rule_SV-254270r958480_rule
                          Test Type:Automated
                          Rule Result:Pass
                          Version:WN22-00-000330
                          Identities:CCI-000382 (NIST SP 800-53: CM-7; NIST SP 800-53A: CM-7.1 (iii); NIST SP 800-53 Rev 4: CM-7 b; NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5: CM-7 b)
                          Description: Unnecessary services increase the attack surface of a system. Some of these services may not support required levels of authentication or encryption.
                          Fix Text:Uninstall the "FTP Server" role.

                          Start "Server Manager".

                          Select the server with the role.

                          Scroll down to "ROLES AND FEATURES" in the right pane.

                          Select "Remove Roles and Features" from the drop-down "TASKS" list.

                          Select the appropriate server on the "Server Selection" page and click "Next".

                          Deselect "FTP Server" under "Web Server (IIS)" on the "Roles" page.

                          Click "Next" and "Remove" as prompted.
                          Severity:medium
                          Weight:10.0
                          Reference:
                          Title:DPMS Target Microsoft Windows Server 2022
                          Publisher:DISA
                          Type:DPMS Target
                          Subject:Microsoft Windows Server 2022
                          Identifier:5485
                          Definitions:
                          Definition ID:oval:mil.disa.stig.windows2022:def:254270
                          Definition Result:true
                          Title:WN22-00-000330 - Windows Server 2022 must not have the Microsoft FTP service installed unless required by the organization.
                          Description:Unnecessary services increase the attack surface of a system. Some of these services may not support required levels of authentication or encryption.
                          Class:compliance
                          Tests:
                          • true (All child tests must be true. (AND))
                            • true (All child tests must be true. (AND))
                              • true (Check to make sure the FTP server role is not present.)
                          Tests:
                          Test ID:oval:mil.disa.stig.win:tst:25427000 (wmi57_test)
                          Result:true
                          Title:Check to make sure the FTP server role is not present.
                          Check Existence:No collected items may exist.
                          Check:Result is based on check existence only.
                          Object ID:oval:mil.disa.stig.win:obj:25427000 (wmi57_object)
                          Object Comment:FTP Server
                          Object Requirements:
                          • namespace must be equal to 'root\cimv2'
                          • wql must be equal to 'SELECT startmode FROM Win32_Service WHERE name='ftpsvc''
                          Collected Item/State Result:
                          [ exists ]
                          • namespace equals 'root\cimv2'
                          • wql equals 'SELECT startmode FROM Win32_Service WHERE name='ftpsvc''

                          V-254271 - Windows Server 2022 must not have the Peer Name Resolution Protocol installed.

                          Rule ID:xccdf_mil.disa.stig_rule_SV-254271r958478_rule
                          Test Type:Automated
                          Rule Result:Pass
                          Version:WN22-00-000340
                          Identities:CCI-000381 (NIST SP 800-53: CM-7; NIST SP 800-53A: CM-7.1 (ii); NIST SP 800-53 Rev 4: CM-7 a; NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5: CM-7 a)
                          Description: Unnecessary services increase the attack surface of a system. Some of these services may not support required levels of authentication or encryption or may provide unauthorized access to the system.
                          Fix Text:Uninstall the "Peer Name Resolution Protocol" feature.

                          Start "Server Manager".

                          Select the server with the feature.

                          Scroll down to "ROLES AND FEATURES" in the right pane.

                          Select "Remove Roles and Features" from the drop-down "TASKS" list.

                          Select the appropriate server on the "Server Selection" page and click "Next".

                          Deselect "Peer Name Resolution Protocol" on the "Features" page.

                          Click "Next" and "Remove" as prompted.
                          Severity:medium
                          Weight:10.0
                          Reference:
                          Title:DPMS Target Microsoft Windows Server 2022
                          Publisher:DISA
                          Type:DPMS Target
                          Subject:Microsoft Windows Server 2022
                          Identifier:5485
                          Definitions:
                          Definition ID:oval:mil.disa.stig.windows2022:def:254271
                          Definition Result:true
                          Title:WN22-00-000340 - Windows Server 2022 must not have the Peer Name Resolution Protocol installed.
                          Description:Unnecessary services increase the attack surface of a system. Some of these services may not support required levels of authentication or encryption or may provide unauthorized access to the system.
                          Class:compliance
                          Tests:
                          • true (All child tests must be true. (AND))
                            • true (All child tests must be true. (AND))
                              • true (The Peer Name Resolution Protocol server feature is disabled or not present)
                          Tests:
                          Test ID:oval:mil.disa.stig.win:tst:25427100 (wmi57_test)
                          Result:true
                          Title:The Peer Name Resolution Protocol server feature is disabled or not present
                          Check Existence:Zero or more collected items may exist.
                          Check:All collected items must match the given state(s).
                          Object ID:oval:mil.disa.stig.win:obj:25427100 (wmi57_object)
                          Object Comment: 
                          Object Requirements:
                          • namespace must be equal to 'root\cimv2'
                          • wql must be equal to 'SELECT startmode FROM Win32_Service WHERE name='PNRPSvc''
                          State ID:oval:mil.disa.stig.win:ste:25427100 (wmi57_state)
                          State Comment: 
                          State Requirements:
                          • for all 'result' the following must be true:
                            • all startmode must be equal to 'Disabled'
                          Collected Item/State Result:
                          [ does not exist ]
                          • namespace equals 'root\cimv2'
                          • wql equals 'SELECT startmode FROM Win32_Service WHERE name='PNRPSvc''

                          Description: Unnecessary services increase the attack surface of a system. Some of these services may not support required levels of authentication or encryption or may provide unauthorized access to the system.

                          Select "Remove Roles and Features" from the drop-down "TASKS" list.

                          Select the appropriate server on the "Server Selection" page and click "Next".

                          Click "Next" and "Remove" as prompted.

                          V-254273 - Windows Server 2022 must not have the Telnet Client installed.

                          Rule ID:xccdf_mil.disa.stig_rule_SV-254273r958480_rule
                          Test Type:Automated
                          Rule Result:Pass
                          Version:WN22-00-000360
                          Identities:CCI-000382 (NIST SP 800-53: CM-7; NIST SP 800-53A: CM-7.1 (iii); NIST SP 800-53 Rev 4: CM-7 b; NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5: CM-7 b)
                          Description: Unnecessary services increase the attack surface of a system. Some of these services may not support required levels of authentication or encryption or may provide unauthorized access to the system.
                          Fix Text:Uninstall the "Telnet Client" feature.

                          Start "Server Manager".

                          Select the server with the feature.

                          Scroll down to "ROLES AND FEATURES" in the right pane.

                          Select "Remove Roles and Features" from the drop-down "TASKS" list.

                          Select the appropriate server on the "Server Selection" page and click "Next".

                          Deselect "Telnet Client" on the "Features" page.

                          Click "Next" and "Remove" as prompted.
                          Severity:medium
                          Weight:10.0
                          Reference:
                          Title:DPMS Target Microsoft Windows Server 2022
                          Publisher:DISA
                          Type:DPMS Target
                          Subject:Microsoft Windows Server 2022
                          Identifier:5485
                          Definitions:
                          Definition ID:oval:mil.disa.stig.windows2022:def:254273
                          Definition Result:true
                          Title:WN22-00-000360 - Windows Server 2022 must not have the Telnet Client installed.
                          Description:Unnecessary services increase the attack surface of a system. Some of these services may not support required levels of authentication or encryption or may provide unauthorized access to the system.
                          Class:compliance
                          Tests:
                          • true (All child tests must be true. (AND))
                            • true (All child tests must be true. (AND))
                              • true (The Telnet Client is not installed on the system)
                          Tests:
                          Test ID:oval:mil.disa.stig.win:tst:25327800 (wmi57_test)
                          Result:true
                          Title:The Telnet Client is not installed on the system
                          Check Existence:All collected items must exist.
                          Check:All collected items must match the given state(s).
                          Object ID:oval:mil.disa.stig.win:obj:25327800 (wmi57_object)
                          Object Comment: 
                          Object Requirements:
                          • namespace must be equal to 'root\cimv2'
                          • wql must be equal to 'SELECT installstate FROM win32_optionalfeature WHERE name = 'TelnetClient''
                          State ID:oval:mil.disa.stig.win:ste:25327800 (wmi57_state)
                          State Comment: 
                          State Requirements:
                          • for all 'result' the following must be true:
                            • at least one installstate must be equal to '2'
                          Collected Item/State Result:
                          [ true ]
                          • namespace equals 'root\cimv2'
                          • wql equals 'SELECT installstate FROM win32_optionalfeature WHERE name = 'TelnetClient''
                          • collected 'result' result:
                            • installstate = '2'

                          V-254274 - Windows Server 2022 must not have the TFTP Client installed.

                          Rule ID:xccdf_mil.disa.stig_rule_SV-254274r958478_rule

                          Version:WN22-00-000370

                          Description: Unnecessary services increase the attack surface of a system. Some of these services may not support required levels of authentication or encryption or may provide unauthorized access to the system.
                          Fix Text:Uninstall the "TFTP Client" feature.

                          Start "Server Manager".

                          Select the server with the feature.

                          Scroll down to "ROLES AND FEATURES" in the right pane.

                          Select the appropriate server on the "Server Selection" page and click "Next".
